calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Lyn Bura, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Dale G. Major, Esq. for Plaintiff: Enterprise Rent-A-Car of San Francisco,
Plaintiff's Witness: Robert Sakogawa, Representative from Enterprise Rent-A-Car of San Francisco were present, was sworned and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Hatem S. Ahmed as follows:
Principal $34,618.00
Prejudgment interest $8,750.28
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $356.00,
for a total of $46,224.28, see scanned document for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
